1.content:
You wake up to find that your the size of an ant, and the closest person to ask for help is a girl/woman from a cartoon that due to your size, it's almost like looking at a skyscraper.

But first...

What cartoon is your soon to be owner/friend/lover from?
1.title: The beginning

info.brief_description: I have one for anime, might as well do this too
info.description:
Ever wanted to have some fun with giant cartoon girls? This is the place to be! Warning, +18 stuff will be allowed in this interactive, so watch out for your innocence!

Things allowed include:
Vore,
Digestion (You must be reborn afterwards)
Unbirth,
Futa,
Lactation,
Butt,
Breasts,
Feet,
+18

Not allowed:
Death,
Scat,
Farts,

I will be removing chapter that have bad grammar, or are only one sentence unless the chapter is simply serving the purpose of offering more routes for other people to take, so please be aware!
